summary: Complete testing of PSP Enhanced Features (chargeback_rate, holding_days, record charges, record payment). All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all features verified.

issues: Demo credentials shown as admin@fxbroker.com / admin123 but actual password is 'password'

backend: GET /api/psp/{psp_id} - Returns chargeback_rate and holding_days fields
GET /api/psp-summary - PSP summary includes chargeback_rate and holding_days
POST /api/psp - Create PSP with chargeback_rate and holding_days
POST /api/transactions - PSP transaction gets psp_holding_days, psp_holding_release_date, psp_chargeback_rate from PSP
PUT /api/psp/transactions/{id}/charges - Record chargeback_amount and extra_charges on transaction
PUT /api/psp/transactions/{id}/charges - Calculates psp_net_amount correctly (Gross - Commission - Chargeback - Extra)
POST /api/psp/transactions/{id}/record-payment - Records actual payment received and updates treasury balance
POST /api/psp/transactions/{id}/record-payment - Records variance when actual != expected
POST /api/psp/transactions/{id}/record-payment - Creates treasury transaction record with psp_settlement type
GET /api/psp/{psp_id}/pending-transactions - Returns transactions with holding_days, release_date, chargeback_rate
frontend: PSP card shows Commission, Chargeback %, Holding days, Settlement time
Add PSP dialog has Chargeback % field (data-testid='psp-chargeback')
Add PSP dialog has Holding Days field (data-testid='psp-holding-days')
PSP details view shows Commission Rate, Chargeback Rate, Holding Time, Settlement Time
Pending Settlements table shows Holding, Release Date, Status columns
Status badges: Holding (blue), Ready (green) based on release date
Deductions column shows Comm, CB (Chargeback), Extra breakdown
Record Charges dialog opens with correct transaction info
Record Charges dialog has Chargeback Amount, Extra Charges, Description fields
Record Charges dialog shows Settlement Preview with net calculation
Record Payment Received dialog opens with transaction summary
Record Payment Received dialog shows Gross, Commission, Chargeback, Extra Charges, Expected Net
Record Payment Received dialog shows Holding Period and Release Date info
Record Payment Received dialog has Actual Amount Received field pre-filled with expected net
Record Payment Received dialog has Treasury Account dropdown
Record Payment button triggers treasury update

critical_code_review_comments: Login page shows wrong demo password (admin123 vs actual 'password') - minor UX issue
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created several TEST_ prefixed transactions for PSP psp_1f22117d21a5 (PayPal). Some transactions were settled during testing to verify treasury updates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PSP Enhanced Features fully tested. Key new fields: 1) PSP model has chargeback_rate (%) and holding_days. 2) Transactions get psp_holding_days, psp_holding_release_date, psp_chargeback_rate from PSP on creation. 3) PUT /api/psp/transactions/{id}/charges allows recording chargeback_amount, extra_charges, charges_description per transaction. 4) POST /api/psp/transactions/{id}/record-payment settles transaction, credits treasury, records variance. 5) Net calculation: Gross - Commission - Chargeback - Extra Charges. 6) Frontend PSPs.js has Record Charges and Record Payment Received dialogs with all fields.

psp_settings.chargeback_rate: Stored as percentage (e.g., 3 for 3%), displayed on PSP card and details view
psp_settings.holding_days: Days PSP holds funds before release, shown in details and pending transactions table

holding_release.psp_holding_days: Copied from PSP to transaction on creation
holding_release.status_badges: Holding (in holding period), Ready (past release date)

record_payment.actual_amount_received: Actual payment from PSP, can differ from expected net
record_payment.settlement_variance: Difference between actual and expected amounts
record_payment.treasury_update: Credits selected treasury account with actual amount
